# terrible_community_crypto_acme_certificate_deactivate_authz (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `order_uri` (String) The ACME v2 order to deactivate. Can be obtained from R`community.crypto.acme_certificate#module:order_uri`.
